activities_projects.title: Barter System Problem Analysis
activities_projects.objective: To analyze the limitations of the barter system and need for money.
steps: List three situations where barter exchange may fail.
Explain how money solves each problem.
Write a short conclusion.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the necessity of money in modern economies.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check clarity of problems identified and logical explanation.

activities_projects.title: Functions of Money in Real Life
activities_projects.objective: To apply the four functions of money to daily situations.
steps: Identify real-life examples for each function of money.
Explain how each function works in that example.
Present findings briefly in class.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect theoretical concepts with practical examples.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess relevance and clarity of examples.

activities_projects.title: Formal vs Informal Credit Comparison
activities_projects.objective: To compare formal and informal sources of credit.
steps: Prepare a comparison table showing interest rate, security, and reliability.
Analyze advantages and disadvantages of each source.
Suggest which is safer and why.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand differences in credit sources and financial risks.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check completeness of comparison and reasoning.

activities_projects.title: Simple Interest Calculation and Analysis
activities_projects.objective: To calculate and interpret simple interest.
steps: Calculate simple interest for a given loan.
Find total repayment amount.
Explain how interest rate affects repayment.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand impact of interest rates on borrowers.

activities_projects.title: Bank Services Study
activities_projects.objective: To analyze services provided by commercial banks.
steps: List major services offered by banks.
Categorize them into deposit and credit services.
Explain their importance in 4–5 lines.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand banking functions in the economy.

activities_projects.title: Credit Case Study Evaluation
activities_projects.objective: To evaluate the benefits and risks of taking loans.
steps: Read a case study about a borrower.
Identify purpose and source of credit.
Analyze whether the loan improved their condition.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students critically analyze the impact of credit.

activities_projects.title: Digital Payment Awareness Project
activities_projects.objective: To explore modern digital payment methods.
steps: List different digital payment methods used in India.
Explain advantages and risks of each.
Prepare a short awareness note.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand benefits and risks of digital transactions.

activities_projects.title: Loan Comparison Activity
activities_projects.objective: To compare two loan offers and choose the better option.
steps: Calculate total repayment for two loans with different interest rates.
Compare the results.
Justify which option is better.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn decision-making in financial matters.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check correct calculation and logical justification.

activities_projects.title: Savings and Investment Plan
activities_projects.objective: To plan savings for a future goal.
steps: Select a future goal (e.g., buying a bicycle).
Calculate monthly savings required.
Explain benefits of regular saving.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand importance of financial planning.
activities_projects.evaluation: Assess accuracy of planning and clarity of explanation.

activities_projects.title: Money Evolution Timeline Analysis
activities_projects.objective: To examine the evolution of money and its impact.
steps: Create a timeline from barter to digital payments.
Identify one advantage of each stage.
Explain how evolution improved transactions.
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand development of money systems over time.
activities_projects.evaluation: Check correctness of timeline and explanation.
